summary: Second iteration testing - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 22/22 (100%), Frontend: 17/17 (100%). Map iframe rendering correctly on web, heatmap with 4901 shooting records, AI integrations (Gemini 3 Flash) working for chat and safety analysis, all CRUD operations functional, JWT auth working, mobile-first UI excellent.
seed_data_creation: No additional seed data created. Using existing admin@example.com and 4901 shooting records from NYC OpenData.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working perfectly. Map iframe fix from iteration 1 is successful. All AI integrations (Gemini 3 Flash) working. Geocoding via Nominatim working. 4901 shooting records synced. No issues found.
